commands.repair_reason: This is an open implementation PR with no discrete repair finding from review; maintainer review and CI resolution are the remaining actions.; Cleared: The diff only changes TypeScript failover classification/policy, tests, and changelog text; I found no security or supply-chain-sensitive change. commands.review_summary:
The branch classifies assistant-prefill provider rejections as format errors, makes terminal format failover reasons surface immediately with a Cloud Code Assist retry exception, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes from source and operator evidence: current main lacks the reported format strings and the linked issue gives concrete Discord/model/session/log steps, though I did not run the live provider flow.
